info.name: FYP Academy API - Complete Collection (ALL ENDPOINTS)

body.raw:
{
  "questionText": "What is photosynthesis?",

  "correctAnswer": "Process by which plants convert sunlight into energy",

}

{
  "examId": "{{examId}}",
  "questionNumber": 1,
  "questionType": "MCQs",
  "questionText": "What is the capital of Pakistan?",
  "marks": 10,
  "options": [
    { "optionText": "Karachi", "isCorrect": false },
    { "optionText": "Islamabad", "isCorrect": true },
    { "optionText": "Lahore", "isCorrect": false },
    { "optionText": "Peshawar", "isCorrect": false }
  ],
  "correctAnswer": "B",
  "explanation": "Islamabad is the capital of Pakistan",
  "difficultyLevel": "Easy"
}
